title: IRRI-ICRISAT Meeting on Ecoregional Approaches
abstract: This report includes information on the principal outputs of the meeting; reports on 4 sessions on ecoregional approaches; databases, information exchange and geographic information systems; and issues for future research; and networks and recommendations. The document also includes the reports of three working groups, and three articles dealing with sorghum in cropping systemsin Asia, legumes in rice-and wheat-based cropping systems of Asia, and rice-legume and rice-cereal cropping systems, respectively
